pages.raw_text:
All the lights except two ON the
Monroe ST. bridge were dark last
night and the police were forced
this morning to reprimand the
Washington Water Power Co. When
Monroe st. bridge is unlighted it is
one of the most dangerous parts of
the city for hold-ups.


Despite the fact that numerous
arc lights are left unlit night after
night the w. w. p. when it makes
out the bills against the city
charges the same as though the
lights were lit full time. The Mon
roe st. franchise requires bridge
lights.


Repeated complaints about this
have been made to the finance COM
mittee Of the council but this COM
mlttee Is evidently content to allow
the company bills paid as rendered
without Directing to the company's
failure to provide a full service as
its contract stipulates.
